perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women stand inside a Costco warehouse store, holding a large yellow box of UCC Oat Latte coffee. They gesture excitedly towards the product while the Costco logo is prominently displayed above them. (2) The scene cuts to a shopping cart being filled with multiple boxes of the same coffee, followed by a transition to a domestic indoor setting where many individual coffee packets are spread out on a marble-top table. (3) The women demonstrate preparing the coffee; one woman is seen sipping a hot cup while wrapped in a blue blanket on a couch, expressing a cozy feeling. The other woman is seen at a desk with a laptop, drinking an iced version of the coffee through a straw. (4) Close-ups show the powder being poured into a teacup and stirred with a golden spoon. (5) The final sequence returns to the two women holding handfuls of the coffee packets, smiling and recommending the product directly to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music starts immediately. A high-energy, professional male voiceover narrates the entire video in Mandarin. (2) Sound effects such as 'swish' and 'pop' are synced with the appearance of text overlays. (3) The narrator's tone remains consistently excited as he describes the price and quantity. (4) Subtle ambient sounds of liquid pouring and ice clinking are audible during the preparation scenes. (5) The music continues at a steady, high BPM until the end of the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '好多人都在買' (Many people are buying) - Hook text, excited tone. (2) 'UCC 香醇燕麥 三合一咖啡' (UCC Mellow Oat 3-in-1 Coffee) - Functional product title. (3) '50入大包裝' (50-pack large package) and '每包只要8.5元' (Only 8.5 yuan per packet) - Functional price/value text. (4) '暖身體及心情' (Warm body and mood) - Emotional descriptive text. (5) '必買清單 不能沒有它' (Must-buy list, can't be without it) - Strong promotional hook.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Store Discovery) -> Value Proposition (Price/Quantity) -> Product Demo (Preparation & Consumption) -> Final Recommendation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators are the focus throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a white NY baseball cap and a black off-the-shoulder top; the other has long black hair and wears a brownish jacket over a patterned dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Initial scenes are in a Costco warehouse with high shelves and bulk merchandise. Later scenes transition to a modern home with a marble table, a grey couch, and a workspace.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright commercial lighting in the store; soft, warm indoor lighting in the home scenes.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Price Comparison -> Benefits -> Application Scenarios -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional recommendation for UCC Oat Latte 3-in-1 coffee, specifically highlighting its availability and value price at Costco. It aims to persuade viewers to purchase the product by demonstrating its convenience, affordability (8.5 NTD per packet), and suitability for both hot and cold preparation, as well as its appeal to those looking for dairy alternatives like oat milk.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct product showcase, price mentioning, and explicit recommendation to buy at a specific retailer (Costco).

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Usage of a high-energy male voiceover to narrate for female creators is a common trend in 'short-video' marketing in the region.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses high-density text overlays and beat-synced editing to maintain viewer engagement and deliver information rapidly, typical of high-conversion social commerce content.
